description.zh: 粗野主义强调材料的原始质感和结构的裸露——粗黑边框、高对比配色、故意的粗糙感。适合个人作品集、创意机构和艺术项目。
description.en: Raw, bold aesthetic with thick borders, high contrast and intentionally rough design. Great for portfolios and creative studios.

zh: 高对比度配色：黑白+亮色
等宽字体、大写字母排版
不对称布局、故意偏移感

hint.zh: 粗野主义风格，粗黑边框+硬边阴影
hint.en: Brutalism, thick black borders + hard shadows

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 使用Brutalist风格：3px以上粗黑边框、硬边阴影(box-shadow: Npx Npx 0 #000)、等宽字体、大写标题、高对比黑白+一个亮色。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 设计Brutalist卡片：背景亮黄色(#FFDE59)，所有边框3px黑色，阴影用offset硬边(无blur)，hover时阴影缩小。文字monospace+uppercase。带"故意不精致"的raw感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Brutalist, raw, thick borders, hard shadows, monospace, uppercase, high contrast, offset

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Use Brutalist style: 3px+ thick black borders, hard-edge shadows (box-shadow: Npx Npx 0 #000), monospace fonts, uppercase titles, high contrast black-white + one bright accent color.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Design a Brutalist card: bright yellow background (#FFDE59), all borders 3px black, shadows use hard-edge offset (no blur), shadow shrinks on hover. Text monospace + uppercase. Convey an intentionally "unpolished" raw feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Brutalist, raw, thick borders, hard shadows, monospace, uppercase, high contrast, offset

zh: 大胆用粗边框和硬阴影
保持高对比度(黑+白+1亮色)

description.zh: 以磨砂玻璃效果为核心，通过半透明背景、模糊滤镜和微妙边框创造层次感。需要精心设计的底层彩色渐变才能展现效果。
description.en: Frosted glass effect with transparency and blur. Layers and depth through translucent panels on colorful backgrounds.

hint.zh: 玻璃拟态，磨砂模糊+半透明层叠
hint.en: Glassmorphism, frosted blur + translucent layers

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 使用Glassmorphism风格：底层彩色渐变(紫→蓝→粉)，卡片用rgba(255,255,255,0.15)+backdrop-filter:blur(20px)磨砂玻璃。边框rgba白色，圆角20px。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Glassmorphism Dashboard：底层animated mesh gradient。所有卡片毛玻璃效果。每层模糊度和透明度有微妙差异创造层次。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Glassmorphism, frosted glass, backdrop-filter, translucent, gradient background, layered

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Use Glassmorphism style: colorful gradient background (purple→blue→pink), cards use rgba(255,255,255,0.15) + backdrop-filter:blur(20px) frosted glass. White rgba borders, border-radius 20px.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Glassmorphism Dashboard: animated mesh gradient background. All cards with frosted glass effect. Each layer has subtle differences in blur and opacity to create depth.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Glassmorphism, frosted glass, backdrop-filter, translucent, gradient background, layered

description.zh: 通过双向阴影(亮面+暗面)模拟柔和光线下的凸起或凹陷效果。统一浅灰底色，组件仿佛从背景中"挤出"。适合设置页面和控制面板。
description.en: Soft 3D effect using light and dark shadows on same-colored backgrounds. Tactile, touchable interface feel.

hint.zh: 新拟态，双向柔和阴影+统一底色
hint.en: Neomorphism, dual soft shadows + unified background

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 使用Neomorphism风格：背景#E4E9F0。组件同色背景，通过双向box-shadow(右下暗色#BEC8D4、左上亮色#FFFFFF)创造立体感。按钮按下用inset。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 新拟态设置面板：开关/滑块/输入框用凸起效果，交互状态用凹陷。激活的开关球体用渐变色+微弱发光。整体浅灰。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Neomorphism, soft UI, dual shadow, light gray, inset/outset, emboss, deboss

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Use Neomorphism style: background #E4E9F0. Components share same background color, create depth via dual box-shadow (dark #BEC8D4 bottom-right, light #FFFFFF top-left). Buttons use inset on press.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Neomorphic settings panel: toggles/sliders/inputs use raised effect, interaction states use recessed. Active toggle sphere uses gradient color + subtle glow. Overall light gray tone.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Neomorphism, soft UI, dual shadow, light gray, inset/outset, emboss, deboss

en: Match card bg to parent bg

description.zh: 每个元素和间距都必须精心推敲。通过大量留白、克制配色和优雅排版传达高级感。难点在于让AI学会"克制"。
description.en: Maximum whitespace, zero decoration. Content breathes. Typography and spacing do all the work.

zh: 精致排版层级和字体选择

hint.zh: 极简主义，大量留白+克制配色
hint.en: Minimalism, abundant whitespace + restrained palette

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 极简设计：只用黑白灰。留白(padding/margin 32px+)。标题用衬线体，装饰只用极细线条(1px #EAEAEA)。无阴影、无渐变、无图标。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 极简落地页：标题用Cormorant Garamond衬线体48px+。页面80%是留白。分区只用细线。按钮只有文字+下划线。行高1.7-1.8。传达「克制的高级感」。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Minimalist, whitespace, restrained, serif, monochrome, thin separators, elegant simplicity

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Minimalist design: only black, white, gray. Generous whitespace (padding/margin 32px+). Serif headings, decoration limited to ultra-thin lines (1px #EAEAEA). No shadows, no gradients, no icons.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Minimalist landing page: headings in Cormorant Garamond serif at 48px+. 80% of page is whitespace. Sections separated only by thin lines. Buttons are text + underline only. Line-height 1.7-1.8. Convey "restrained elegance."

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Minimalist, whitespace, restrained, serif, monochrome, thin separators, elegant simplicity

description.zh: 粉紫渐变、金属光泽、气泡形状和闪烁元素。自带情绪和温度，适合时尚、音乐、潮牌。难点在于金属/光泽质感还原。
description.en: Nostalgic 2000s aesthetic with candy gradients, chrome effects, and bubble shapes. Fun and playful.

hint.zh: Y2K千禧风，糖果色渐变+气泡圆角
hint.en: Y2K retro, candy gradients + bubble rounded corners

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Y2K风格：渐变粉(#FF6B9D)→紫(#C66AFF)→青(#00D4FF)。白色卡片+大圆角24px+彩色投影。药丸按钮+hover上浮。星星(✦✧)闪烁装饰。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Y2K落地页：粉紫渐变+漂浮气泡。chrome金属文字(白→灰→白gradient+background-clip:text)。药丸按钮+渐变。✦twinkle动画。甜美、闪亮、怀旧未来感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Y2K, candy gradient, chrome, bubbly, pill buttons, sparkle, glossy, pink-purple-cyan

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Y2K style: gradient pink (#FF6B9D) → purple (#C66AFF) → cyan (#00D4FF). White cards + large radius 24px + colored shadows. Pill buttons + hover float. Star (✦✧) sparkle decorations.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Y2K landing page: pink-purple gradient + floating bubbles. Chrome metallic text (white→gray→white gradient + background-clip:text). Pill buttons + gradient. ✦ twinkle animation. Sweet, shiny, nostalgic-futuristic.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Y2K, candy gradient, chrome, bubbly, pill buttons, sparkle, glossy, pink-purple-cyan

description.zh: 深色背景+金属色点缀+精致排版传达高端感。广泛用于珠宝、手表、汽车等。关键：「克制地使用金色」——点到为止才是奢华。
description.en: Dark backgrounds with gold accents, serif typography, and refined spacing. Premium and exclusive.

hint.zh: 暗黑奢华，深色底+金色点缀+衬线体
hint.en: Dark luxury, dark base + gold accents + serif fonts

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Dark Luxury风格：背景#0A0A0A，文字暖白(#F5E6C8)，标题衬线体。金色(#C5A55A)做边框和标签。分隔线渐变(透明→金→透明)。按钮hover金色填充。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 暗黑奢华产品页：深色底+微妙金色径向光晕。小标签全大写+0.3em字间距+9px。分隔线渐变金色。按钮透明底+金色描边。金色只做点缀，不要大面积。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Dark luxury, black, gold accent, serif, wide letter-spacing, gradient divider, restrained, premium

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Dark Luxury style: background #0A0A0A, warm white text (#F5E6C8), serif headings. Gold (#C5A55A) for borders and labels. Divider gradient (transparent→gold→transparent). Button fills gold on hover.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Dark luxury product page: dark base + subtle gold radial glow. Small labels all-caps + 0.3em letter-spacing + 9px. Gradient gold dividers. Buttons transparent + gold outline. Gold used sparingly as accent only.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Dark luxury, black, gold accent, serif, wide letter-spacing, gradient divider, restrained, premium

description.zh: 从自然界汲取灵感，大地色系、有机不规则形状和温暖质感。适合健康食品、环保品牌和Wellness App。
description.en: Earthy tones, rounded shapes, and natural textures. Warm and approachable nature-inspired design.

zh: 大地色系(橄榄绿/暖棕/米色)

hint.zh: 有机自然，大地色+不规则圆角+温暖质感
hint.en: Organic nature, earth tones + irregular radius + warm texture

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Organic风格：暖米色(#F4EDE4)底。主色橄榄绿(#6B8F71)，辅色暖棕。圆角24px，柔和阴影。有机blob装饰。药丸按钮+绿色。温暖自然感。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Wellness App：米色底+淡绿blob装饰。图标用不规则圆角容器。文字用绿色系层级。卡片暖白(#FBF8F4)+暖色阴影。全部圆润无直角。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Organic, nature, earthy, olive green, warm beige, blob shapes, rounded, soft shadow, wellness

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Organic style: warm beige (#F4EDE4) background. Primary olive green (#6B8F71), secondary warm brown. Border-radius 24px, soft shadows. Organic blob decorations. Green pill buttons. Warm natural feel.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Wellness App: beige bg + light green blob decorations. Icons in irregular-radius containers. Text hierarchy in green tones. Cards warm white (#FBF8F4) + warm shadows. Everything rounded, no sharp edges.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Organic, nature, earthy, olive green, warm beige, blob shapes, rounded, soft shadow, wellness

description.zh: 深邃暗色背景上霓虹色的边框和文字发出耀眼光芒。扫描线、削角造型和故障效果是标志。游戏和科技领域非常受欢迎。
description.en: Neon colors on dark backgrounds with glitch effects and futuristic UI patterns. High-tech dystopian.

hint.zh: 赛博朋克，霓虹粉青+发光+削角造型
hint.en: Cyberpunk, neon pink-cyan + glow + clipped corners

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Cyberpunk风格：背景#0D0221。霓虹粉(#FF2E97)+青(#00FFF0)。clip-path削角。发光效果(text-shadow/box-shadow)。扫描线(repeating-linear-gradient)。monospace字体。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 赛博朋克数据面板：深紫黑+扫描线叠加。主面板clip-path削角，品红→青渐变边框。标题品红+发光。数据青色monospace。输入框focus发光。glitch hover效果。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Cyberpunk, neon, magenta, cyan, glow, scanlines, clip-path, glitch, monospace, futuristic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Cyberpunk style: background #0D0221. Neon pink (#FF2E97) + cyan (#00FFF0). clip-path clipped corners. Glow effects (text-shadow/box-shadow). Scanlines (repeating-linear-gradient). Monospace fonts.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Cyberpunk data panel: deep purple-black + scanline overlay. Main panel clip-path clipped corners, magenta→cyan gradient border. Magenta title + glow. Cyan monospace data. Input focus glow. Glitch hover effect.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Cyberpunk, neon, magenta, cyan, glow, scanlines, clip-path, glitch, monospace, futuristic

description.zh: 灵感来自3D Clay渲染。柔和色彩、超大圆角、厚实底部阴影和内部高光，营造"软软的可以捏"的质感。适合儿童产品和趣味App。
description.en: Soft 3D clay-like appearance with rounded shapes and playful colors. Friendly and approachable.

zh: 白色半透明内边框模拟高光

hint.zh: 粘土风，超大圆角+彩色厚阴影+柔和配色
hint.en: Claymorphism, large radius + colored thick shadows + soft colors

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Claymorphism风格：浅灰底(#F0F0F3)。超大圆角24px+白色半透明边框+彩色offset阴影(不blur，多层)。按钮渐变粉/紫+同色阴影。软软的可以捏的感觉。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 粘土风任务App：浅灰底。卡片白色+厚彩色阴影(每张不同色)。图标渐变色方块+自身颜色阴影。主/次按钮区分。圆角至少20px。3D粘土渲染感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Claymorphism, clay, soft 3D, big radius, colored offset shadow, pastel, playful, white border

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Claymorphism style: light gray background (#F0F0F3). Large radius 24px + white translucent border + colored offset shadows (no blur, multi-layer). Buttons gradient pink/purple + matching shadows. Soft, squishy, clay-like feel.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Clay-style task app: light gray bg. White cards + thick colored shadows (different colors per card). Icons in gradient color squares + matching shadow. Primary/secondary button distinction. Radius at least 20px. 3D clay render feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Claymorphism, clay, soft 3D, big radius, colored offset shadow, pastel, playful, white border

description.zh: 传统印刷设计智慧带入网页：强烈字体层级对比、栏格系统、衬线与无衬线混搭、一条贯穿全局的强调色。最考验排版功力。
description.en: Magazine-inspired layout with strong typography hierarchy, grid systems, and refined spacing.

hint.zh: 编辑排版，字体大小对比+衬线混搭
hint.en: Editorial, extreme type scale + serif mixed with sans-serif

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Editorial风格：奶白底。标题Playfair Display 48px+ font-weight 900。小标签IBM Plex Mono 9px全大写+0.3em字间距。2px粗线分隔。一种强调色(#E63946)。杂志排版感。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: 编辑风博客：超大衬线标题(64-80px)+斜体副标题+等宽小号日期。2px实线分隔。两栏grid布局。页面中间红色小色块(24px×3px)装饰。黑白灰+一点红。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Editorial, magazine, serif headline, monospace labels, extreme type scale, grid, one accent color

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Editorial style: cream white background. Headings Playfair Display 48px+ font-weight 900. Small labels IBM Plex Mono 9px all-caps + 0.3em letter-spacing. 2px thick dividers. One accent color (#E63946). Magazine typography feel.

en.title: Advanced Prompt
en.text: Editorial blog: oversized serif headings (64-80px) + italic subtitles + monospace small dates. 2px solid dividers. Two-column grid layout. Red color block (24px×3px) decoration mid-page. Black-white-gray + a touch of red.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Editorial, magazine, serif headline, monospace labels, extreme type scale, grid, one accent color

zh: 标题和标签字号差距够大
小标签全大写+宽字间距

description.zh: 去掉所有拟物元素(阴影、渐变、纹理)，用纯色块、简洁图标和清晰的层级传递信息。是现代UI设计的基础语言。
description.en: Clean, simple design with solid colors, no shadows or gradients. Focus on clarity and usability.

hint.zh: 扁平设计，纯色块+零阴影+清晰层级
hint.en: Flat design, solid color blocks + zero shadows + clear hierarchy

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Flat Design风格：白色背景，不要任何阴影和渐变。用纯色块区分层级。主色用Google Blue(#4285F4)。圆角8px。按钮纯色填充，hover变深一档。干净利落。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Flat design, no shadows, solid colors, clean, simple, Google Material-like, primary colors

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Flat Design style: white background, no shadows or gradients whatsoever. Solid color blocks for hierarchy. Primary Google Blue (#4285F4). Border-radius 8px. Buttons solid fill, hover darkens one shade. Clean and crisp.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Flat design, no shadows, solid colors, clean, simple, Google Material-like, primary colors

description.zh: Google提出的设计语言，用"纸"和"墨水"的隐喻。通过海拔阴影(elevation)系统表达层级，配合涟漪动效和大胆配色。
description.en: Google's design system with elevation shadows, responsive motion, and structured components.

hint.zh: Material Design，海拔阴影+涟漪+大胆配色
hint.en: Material Design, elevation shadows + ripple + bold colors

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Material Design风格：白色卡片+elevation阴影系统(低：2px blur, 中：8px, 高：16px)。主色深紫(#6200EA)。药丸按钮+大写文字。圆角12px。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Material Design, elevation, shadow levels, ripple, FAB button, purple theme, rounded corners

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Material Design style: white cards + elevation shadow system (low: 2px blur, medium: 8px, high: 16px). Primary deep purple (#6200EA). Pill buttons + uppercase text. Border-radius 12px.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Material Design, elevation, shadow levels, ripple, FAB button, purple theme, rounded corners

description.zh: 源自国际主义平面设计(Swiss Style)。网格严格对齐、无衬线字体为主、一个红色强调色、功能至上的理性美学。
description.en: International typographic style with rigid grids, sans-serif fonts, and mathematical precision.

hint.zh: 瑞士极简，网格对齐+红色强调+无衬线
hint.en: Swiss minimalist, grid alignment + red accent + sans-serif

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Swiss Style风格：白底+黑字+一个红色(#E63946)做唯一强调色。所有元素严格网格对齐。无衬线字体，字重对比做层级。左侧4px红色竖线。不要任何装饰。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Swiss style, International Typographic Style, grid, Helvetica, red accent, rational, functional

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Swiss Style: white bg + black text + one red (#E63946) as the only accent. All elements strictly grid-aligned. Sans-serif font, font-weight contrast for hierarchy. Left 4px red vertical line. No decoration.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Swiss style, International Typographic Style, grid, Helvetica, red accent, rational, functional

description.zh: 80/90年代消费主义美学的讽刺重构。粉紫渐变天空、网格地面、霓虹色调和怀旧数字质感。融合了日系美学和复古科技感。
description.en: Retro-futuristic aesthetic with pink-purple gradients, Greek statues, and 90s computer nostalgia.

hint.zh: 蒸汽波，粉紫渐变+霓虹+复古网格
hint.en: Vaporwave, pink-purple gradient + neon + retro grid

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Vaporwave风格：深紫渐变底。霓虹粉(#FF71CE)和青(#01CDFE)做强调。文字带微弱发光。卡片半透明深色+霓虹色边框。大写标签。复古怀旧+未来感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Vaporwave, retro, neon pink, cyan, purple gradient, nostalgic, grid, aesthetic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Vaporwave style: deep purple gradient background. Neon pink (#FF71CE) and cyan (#01CDFE) accents. Text with subtle glow. Cards semi-transparent dark + neon borders. Uppercase labels. Retro-nostalgic + futuristic vibe.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Vaporwave, retro, neon pink, cyan, purple gradient, nostalgic, grid, aesthetic

description.zh: 20世纪20-30年代的装饰艺术风格。几何图案、金色装饰、对称构图和奢华质感。常见于高端酒店、首饰品牌和鸡尾酒吧。
description.en: Geometric patterns, gold accents, symmetrical layouts inspired by 1920s decorative arts movement.

hint.zh: 装饰艺术，金色几何+对称+衬线体
hint.en: Art Deco, gold geometric + symmetry + serif fonts

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Art Deco风格：深蓝底(#1A2332)+金色(#D4AF37)装饰。中心对称排版。标题衬线体。金色细边框+◆钻石符号装饰。小标签用超宽字间距(0.4em)全大写。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Art Deco, gold, geometric, symmetrical, 1920s, luxury serif, diamond shapes, ornamental

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Art Deco style: deep blue bg (#1A2332) + gold (#D4AF37) decoration. Center-symmetrical layout. Serif headings. Gold thin borders + ◆ diamond symbols. Small labels extra-wide letter-spacing (0.4em) all-caps.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Art Deco, gold, geometric, symmetrical, 1920s, luxury serif, diamond shapes, ornamental

description.zh: 源自1920年代德国包豪斯学校。三原色(红蓝黄)+黑白、几何基本形(圆/方/三角)和功能主义理念。形式追随功能。
description.en: Form follows function. Primary colors, geometric shapes, and rational design from the Bauhaus school.

zh: 功能主义，形式追随功能

hint.zh: 包豪斯，三原色+几何形+功能主义
hint.en: Bauhaus, primary colors + geometric shapes + functionalism

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Bauhaus风格：暖白底+黑色粗边框(2px)。只用三原色(红#E63946/蓝#2D5FD8/黄#FFD43B)做点缀。标签黄底黑字。圆形和方形几何装饰。无衬线粗体标题。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Bauhaus, primary colors, geometric, functional, black border, circle square triangle, modernist

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Bauhaus style: warm white bg + black thick borders (2px). Only primary colors (red #E63946 / blue #2D5FD8 / yellow #FFD43B) as accents. Labels yellow bg + black text. Circle and square geometric decorations. Bold sans-serif headings.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Bauhaus, primary colors, geometric, functional, black border, circle square triangle, modernist

description.zh: 模拟命令行终端的视觉风格。黑色背景、绿色(或琥珀色)等宽字体、命令行提示符和闪烁光标。极客文化的视觉符号。
description.en: Command-line interface aesthetic with monospace fonts, dark backgrounds, and green/amber text.

hint.zh: 终端风，黑底绿字+等宽字体+命令行
hint.en: Terminal, black bg + green text + monospace + command line

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Terminal风格：黑底(#111)+绿色文字(#00FF41)。所有字体用等宽体。卡片顶部加●●●窗口按钮。标题前加"> "提示符。标签前加"$ cat "。边框用#333。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Terminal, CLI, green on black, monospace, command prompt, hacker aesthetic, retro computing

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Terminal style: black bg (#111) + green text (#00FF41). All fonts monospace. Card top with ●●● window buttons. Headings prefixed with "> ". Labels prefixed with "$ cat ". Borders #333.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Terminal, CLI, green on black, monospace, command prompt, hacker aesthetic, retro computing

description.zh: 纯黑白设计，零色彩。通过明暗对比、字重差异和空间关系创造视觉张力。考验的是纯粹的构成能力。
description.en: Pure black and white design. Zero color, maximum contrast. Typography and composition are everything.

hint.zh: 单色风，纯黑白+强对比+字重层级
hint.en: Monochrome, pure black-white + strong contrast + type hierarchy

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Monochrome风格：纯黑白设计，不要任何色彩。黑底白字。用字重(粗/细)和字号差异创造层级。标签暗灰。直角无圆角。按钮白底黑字+hover反转。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Monochrome, black and white, zero color, contrast, typographic hierarchy, stark, bold

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Monochrome style: pure black-and-white, zero color. Black bg, white text. Use font-weight (bold/light) and size contrast for hierarchy. Labels dark gray. Sharp corners, no radius. Buttons white bg + black text, hover inverts.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Monochrome, black and white, zero color, contrast, typographic hierarchy, stark, bold

description.zh: 以文字本身作为设计的主角。超大字号、极端字重对比和夸张的排版构成创造视觉冲击力。
description.en: Typography as the hero. Oversized headings, extreme weight contrasts, and text-driven layouts.

hint.zh: 粗体排版，超大字号+极端字重对比
hint.en: Bold typography, oversized text + extreme weight contrast

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Bold Typography风格：标题用condensed无衬线体(如Bebas Neue) 42px+。配一个强调色做标签(红/橙)。正文小而克制。文字大小差距要极端，形成视觉冲击。按钮全大写+宽字间距。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Bold typography, oversized, condensed font, extreme weight contrast, type-driven, impactful

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Bold Typography style: headings in condensed sans-serif (e.g. Bebas Neue) 42px+. One accent color for labels (red/orange). Body text small and restrained. Extreme size contrast for visual impact. Buttons all-caps + wide letter-spacing.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Bold typography, oversized, condensed font, extreme weight contrast, type-driven, impactful

description.zh: 加密货币和去中心化世界的视觉语言。深色背景、紫蓝渐变边框、微光效果和未来科技感。DeFi和NFT项目的标配。
description.en: Crypto/DeFi visual language. Dark backgrounds, purple-blue gradients, glow effects, and frosted glass.

hint.zh: Web3风，深色底+紫蓝渐变+微光效果
hint.en: Web3, dark base + purple-blue gradient + subtle glow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Web3风格：深色底(#0A0A1A)。卡片半透明+紫蓝渐变边框。按钮紫蓝渐变+发光阴影。标签紫色背景透明。整体科技感+未来感。backdrop-filter:blur做毛玻璃。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Web3, crypto, dark UI, purple gradient, indigo, glow, frosted, futuristic, DeFi aesthetic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Web3 style: dark base (#0A0A1A). Cards semi-transparent + purple-blue gradient border. Buttons purple-blue gradient + glow shadow. Labels translucent purple bg. Tech + futuristic feel. backdrop-filter:blur for frosted glass.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Web3, crypto, dark UI, purple gradient, indigo, glow, frosted, futuristic, DeFi aesthetic

description.zh: 灵感来自工厂、仓库和机械。金属灰底色、等宽字体、警告色点缀和实用主义的粗犷感。适合工具类和硬核产品。
description.en: Raw, utilitarian aesthetic inspired by factories and machinery. Exposed structure, function-first design.

hint.zh: 工业风，金属灰+琥珀色+等宽大写
hint.en: Industrial, metallic gray + amber accent + monospace uppercase

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Industrial风格：金属灰底(#333330)。琥珀/黄色(#F5A623)做强调。等宽字体+大写+宽字间距。边框用深灰。按钮描边琥珀色。整体实用主义、工厂感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Industrial, metallic gray, amber, monospace, uppercase, utilitarian, rugged, tool-like

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Industrial style: metallic gray bg (#333330). Amber/yellow (#F5A623) accent. Monospace fonts + uppercase + wide letter-spacing. Borders dark gray. Buttons amber outline. Utilitarian, factory-like feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Industrial, metallic gray, amber, monospace, uppercase, utilitarian, rugged, tool-like

description.zh: 模拟学术论文和古典书籍的排版。纸张质感底色、衬线字体、脚注风格标注和引用格式。知识类和文化类产品的理想选择。
description.en: Classic academic style with serif fonts, warm tones, and scholarly gravitas. Intellectual and timeless.

hint.zh: 学术风，纸张质感+衬线体+脚注格式
hint.en: Academia, paper texture + serif font + footnote formatting

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Academia风格：纸张底色(#F5F1E8)。衬线字体(Crimson Pro)为主。标签用[方括号]包裹+等宽小字。描述用斜体。分隔线用棕色。整体像学术论文的排版。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Academia, scholarly, serif, paper texture, footnotes, brackets, italic, warm tones

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Academia style: paper-toned bg (#F5F1E8). Serif font (Crimson Pro) as primary. Labels in [square brackets] + monospace small text. Descriptions in italic. Dividers in brown. Like an academic paper layout.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Academia, scholarly, serif, paper texture, footnotes, brackets, italic, warm tones

description.zh: 现代SaaS产品的标准视觉语言。干净白底、蓝紫渐变强调色、微妙阴影和专业可信赖的感觉。最常见也最安全的选择。
description.en: Clean, professional SaaS product design. Trust-building, conversion-focused, with clear CTAs.

hint.zh: SaaS风格，白底+蓝紫渐变+微妙阴影
hint.en: SaaS, white base + blue-purple gradient + subtle shadow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: SaaS风格：白底+微妙卡片阴影(0 1px 3px + 0 4px 16px)。主色蓝(#3B82F6)。按钮蓝紫渐变+发光阴影。标签浅蓝底+蓝字。圆角14px。现代专业感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: SaaS, clean, professional, blue gradient, subtle shadow, modern, trustworthy, rounded

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: SaaS style: white bg + subtle card shadows (0 1px 3px + 0 4px 16px). Primary blue (#3B82F6). Buttons blue-purple gradient + glow shadow. Labels light blue bg + blue text. Border-radius 14px. Modern professional feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: SaaS, clean, professional, blue gradient, subtle shadow, modern, trustworthy, rounded

description.zh: 模拟传统报纸的排版设计。泛黄纸张底色、衬线标题、分栏排版和粗细线条规则。适合新闻类和内容聚合类产品。
description.en: Classic newspaper layout with column grids, serif headlines, and structured content hierarchy.

hint.zh: 报纸风，泛黄底+衬线标题+分栏排版
hint.en: Newsprint, aged paper bg + serif headings + columnar layout

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Newsprint风格：泛黄底(#F0EBDD)。标题Playfair Display大衬线+3px double下边框。日期等宽8px全大写。描述文字用两栏排版(CSS columns)。像传统报纸的排版。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Newsprint, newspaper, serif headline, columns, double border, dateline, aged paper

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Newsprint style: aged paper bg (#F0EBDD). Headings Playfair Display large serif + 3px double bottom border. Dates monospace 8px all-caps. Body text two-column layout (CSS columns). Traditional newspaper typography.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Newsprint, newspaper, serif headline, columns, double border, dateline, aged paper

description.zh: 与极简主义相反——更多色彩、更多层次、更多装饰、更多冲突。通过"有组织的混乱"创造视觉能量。适合创意品牌和年轻受众。
description.en: More is more. Layer everything—patterns, colors, textures, typography—for maximum visual impact.

zh: 多层装饰(边框+阴影+图案)

hint.zh: 极繁主义，多色彩+多装饰+有组织的混乱
hint.en: Maximalism, multi-color + multi-decoration + organized chaos

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Maximalism风格：多色渐变背景(红/黄/青/紫)。卡片白色+黑色粗边框+多色阴影(红+青offset)。顶部彩虹渐变条。标签黄底+黑色描边。按钮青色+黑色描边+硬阴影。✦装饰。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Maximalism, colorful, layered, decorative, multi-shadow, organized chaos, bold, energetic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Maximalism style: multi-color gradient bg (red/yellow/cyan/purple). White cards + black thick borders + multi-color shadows (red + cyan offset). Top rainbow gradient bar. Labels yellow bg + black outline. Button cyan + black outline + hard shadow. ✦ decorations.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Maximalism, colorful, layered, decorative, multi-shadow, organized chaos, bold, energetic

description.zh: 模拟手绘/铅笔风格。不规则的边框圆角、虚线装饰、手写感字体和"未完成"的草稿质感。适合创意工具和教育产品。
description.en: Hand-drawn illustration style with organic lines, doodle elements, and friendly, personal feel.

hint.zh: 手绘风，不规则圆角+虚线+草稿质感
hint.en: Sketch, irregular radius + dashed lines + draft feel

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Sketch/手绘风格：纸白底色。边框2px实线+不规则圆角(12px 4px 12px 4px)。分隔线用虚线(dashed)。标签用dashed边框+暖橙色。整体有铅笔画草稿的未完成感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Sketch, hand-drawn, dashed border, irregular radius, pencil, draft, warm paper

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Sketch/hand-drawn style: paper white bg. Borders 2px solid + irregular radius (12px 4px 12px 4px). Dividers use dashed lines. Labels with dashed borders + warm orange. Pencil-drawn draft, unfinished feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Sketch, hand-drawn, dashed border, irregular radius, pencil, draft, warm paper

description.zh: 融合植物学绘图和自然元素的精致风格。奶油底色、深绿配色、衬线字体和细腻的装饰线。适合花艺、茶饮和生活方式品牌。
description.en: Plant and nature-inspired design with green tones, leaf motifs, and elegant organic layouts.

hint.zh: 植物风，奶油底+深绿+衬线体+自然元素
hint.en: Botanical, cream bg + deep green + serif + natural elements

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Botanical风格：奶油底(#F7F3EE)。文字深绿(#2E3D20)。标题用Crimson Pro衬线体。标签浅绿底。按钮橄榄绿。边框用暖棕(#D5CDB8)。整体精致自然，像植物学图鉴。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Botanical, plant, cream background, olive green, serif, natural, elegant, floral

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Botanical style: cream bg (#F7F3EE). Deep green text (#2E3D20). Headings Crimson Pro serif. Labels light green bg. Buttons olive green. Borders warm brown (#D5CDB8). Refined and natural, like a botanical illustration guide.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Botanical, plant, cream background, olive green, serif, natural, elegant, floral

description.zh: 当代最流行的暗色UI模式。近黑底色、微妙的灰度层次、蓝色强调和清晰的信息层级。适合开发者工具和专业软件。
description.en: Modern dark UI with subtle gradients, blue accents, and refined glass effects. Developer-favorite aesthetic.

hint.zh: 现代暗色，近黑底+微灰层次+蓝色强调
hint.en: Modern dark, near-black base + subtle gray layers + blue accent

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Modern Dark风格：背景#111113，卡片#18181B。边框#27272A做层级区分。蓝色(#3B82F6)做唯一强调色。圆角14px。文字白色层级：#FAFAFA > #A1A1AA > #71717A。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Modern dark, dark mode, zinc, blue accent, subtle borders, professional, developer-focused

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Modern Dark style: bg #111113, cards #18181B. Borders #27272A for layer separation. Blue (#3B82F6) as the only accent. Border-radius 14px. Text white hierarchy: #FAFAFA > #A1A1AA > #71717A.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Modern dark, dark mode, zinc, blue accent, subtle borders, professional, developer-focused

description.zh: 用基本几何形(圆/方/三角)和明亮色彩创造活泼有趣的视觉体验。适合教育产品、儿童应用和创意平台。
description.en: Playful geometric shapes with bold colors, thick borders, and energetic, fun compositions.

hint.zh: 几何趣味，明亮色彩+几何装饰+粗边框
hint.en: Playful geometric, bright colors + geometric decorations + thick borders

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Playful Geometric风格：浅色底+彩色几何装饰(圆形/方形用色块和描边)。卡片白色+2px黑边框+20px圆角。按钮黄底+黑描边+药丸形状。顶部彩色条。标签绿底。活泼有趣。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Playful, geometric, colorful, circles, squares, bold border, fun, energetic, children

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Playful Geometric style: light bg + colorful geometric decorations (circles/squares as color blocks and outlines). White cards + 2px black border + 20px radius. Buttons yellow bg + black outline + pill shape. Top color bar. Labels green bg. Fun and playful.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Playful, geometric, colorful, circles, squares, bold border, fun, energetic, children

description.zh: 通过倾斜元素、对角线构图和动态背景传达运动感和能量。适合体育、音乐和活动类产品。
description.en: Motion and energy through tilted elements, diagonal compositions, and warm dynamic gradients.

hint.zh: 动感风，倾斜元素+对角线+红橙渐变
hint.en: Kinetic, tilted elements + diagonals + red-orange gradient

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Kinetic风格：深色底+对角线条纹背景(subtle)。卡片微倾斜(rotate -1deg)。红→橙渐变做按钮和装饰条。标签红色半透明底+大写。充满运动感和动态能量。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Kinetic, dynamic, diagonal, rotated, red-orange gradient, energetic, motion, sporty

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Kinetic style: dark bg + subtle diagonal stripe pattern. Cards slightly tilted (rotate -1deg). Red→orange gradient for buttons and accent bars. Labels red semi-transparent bg + uppercase. Full of motion and dynamic energy.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Kinetic, dynamic, diagonal, rotated, red-orange gradient, energetic, motion, sporty

description.zh: 模拟北极光的梦幻渐变和柔和光晕。深色底上叠加流动的紫蓝青色渐变，营造宇宙感和诗意氛围。适合冥想、音乐和高端品牌。
description.en: Dreamy gradient glows inspired by northern lights. Deep backgrounds with flowing purple-blue-cyan blends.

hint.zh: 极光风，深色底+紫蓝流动渐变+毛玻璃+柔和光晕
hint.en: Aurora, dark base + purple-blue flowing gradient + frosted glass + soft glow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Aurora极光风格：深色底(#0F0C29到#302B63渐变)。叠加紫蓝色径向渐变光斑，微妙呼吸动画。卡片半透明毛玻璃+1px白色透明边框+18px圆角。蓝紫渐变按钮。整体梦幻宇宙感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Aurora, northern lights, gradient glow, dreamy, cosmic, blue-purple, frosted glass, ethereal, ambient

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Aurora style: dark bg (#0F0C29 to #302B63 gradient). Overlay purple-blue radial gradient blobs with subtle breathing animation. Cards semi-transparent frosted glass + 1px white translucent border + 18px radius. Blue-purple gradient buttons. Dreamy cosmic feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Aurora, northern lights, gradient glow, dreamy, cosmic, blue-purple, frosted glass, ethereal, ambient

zh: 用大面积柔和渐变光斑

description.zh: 源自80年代孟菲斯设计运动，用大胆的几何形状、鲜艳色彩和不对称布局打破规则。充满活力和趣味性。适合创意品牌和年轻受众。
description.en: Bold 80s Memphis Design Movement. Clashing colors, geometric shapes, squiggles, and offset shadows.

zh: 大胆几何形状(圆/方/三角)

hint.zh: 孟菲斯，80s大胆几何+鲜艳色彩+offset阴影+虚线
hint.en: Memphis, 80s bold geometric + bright colors + offset shadows + dashed lines

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Memphis孟菲斯风格：明黄底色。卡片白底+3px黑边框+offset彩色阴影(6px)。无圆角。大胆几何装饰(圆形/方形做背景)。青绿色标签。红色按钮+黑描边。虚线分割线。趣味活泼的80年代感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Memphis, 80s, bold geometric, squiggles, offset shadow, bright colors, coral, teal, purple, playful, postmodern

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Memphis style: bright yellow bg. White cards + 3px black border + colored offset shadow (6px). No border-radius. Bold geometric decorations (circles/squares). Teal labels. Red button + black outline. Dashed dividers. Fun, playful 80s feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Memphis, 80s, bold geometric, squiggles, offset shadow, bright colors, coral, teal, purple, playful, postmodern

description.zh: 致敬8-bit像素游戏的复古美学。低分辨率质感、有限色板和方块化设计元素，唤起怀旧的游戏感。适合游戏、复古和极客产品。
description.en: 8-bit pixel art retro gaming aesthetic. Limited palette, no border-radius, monospace fonts.

hint.zh: 像素风，方块化+无圆角+等宽字体+复古游戏色
hint.en: Pixel art, blocky + no border-radius + monospace + retro game colors

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Pixel Art像素风格：深蓝黑底(#1A1C2C)。卡片深色+3px实色边框+无圆角。4px offset阴影。等宽字体(monospace)。红色按钮+像素感。标签绿底。有限色板(4-6色)。8-bit复古游戏感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Pixel art, 8-bit, retro gaming, monospace, no border-radius, limited palette, sharp edges, blocky, nostalgic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Pixel Art style: dark blue-black bg (#1A1C2C). Dark cards + 3px solid border + no border-radius. 4px offset shadow. Monospace font throughout. Red buttons + pixel feel. Green labels. Limited palette (4-6 colors). 8-bit retro gaming feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Pixel art, 8-bit, retro gaming, monospace, no border-radius, limited palette, sharp edges, blocky, nostalgic

description.zh: 融合日本侘寂美学和北欧功能主义的设计哲学。极度克制的配色、天然材质感和留白艺术。适合家居、茶饮和高端生活方式品牌。
description.en: Japanese wabi-sabi meets Scandinavian functionalism. Ultra-restrained earth tones and generous whitespace.

hint.zh: 日式北欧，大地色+衬线字体+极度留白+微阴影
hint.en: Japandi, earth tones + serif font + generous whitespace + micro shadow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Japandi日式北欧风格：暖白底(#F5F0EB)。卡片微白+极小阴影+4px小圆角。大地色系(米/棕/灰褐)。衬线字体做标题。极简装饰—只用2px线条和留白。标签用细边框+大写小字。传达安静克制的美感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Japandi, wabi-sabi, Scandinavian, muted earth tones, serif, whitespace, minimal, warm neutral, zen

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Japandi style: warm white bg (#F5F0EB). Cards slightly white + minimal shadow + 4px small radius. Earth tones (beige/brown/gray-brown). Serif headings. Minimal decoration — only 2px lines and whitespace. Labels thin borders + uppercase small text. Quiet, restrained beauty.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Japandi, wabi-sabi, Scandinavian, muted earth tones, serif, whitespace, minimal, warm neutral, zen

description.zh: 模拟真实霓虹灯管的发光效果。纯黑底上用粉色、青色等高饱和色叠加光晕。营造夜店、都市夜晚的氛围。适合娱乐、音乐和夜生活品牌。
description.en: Real neon tube glow effects on pure black. Pink and cyan high-saturation colors with text-shadow halos.

hint.zh: 霓虹灯光，纯黑底+粉色/青色发光+text-shadow光晕
hint.en: Neon glow, pure black base + pink/cyan glow + text-shadow halos

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Neon Glow霓虹风格：纯黑底(#0A0A0A)。卡片透明+霓虹粉(#FF0080)边框+box-shadow发光效果。标签霓虹青(#00FFFF)+text-shadow发光。按钮霓虹粉描边+发光。文字适度添加text-shadow光晕。都市夜晚氛围。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Neon, glow, neon pink, cyan, text-shadow, box-shadow, dark background, nightlife, fluorescent, luminous

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Neon Glow style: pure black bg (#0A0A0A). Cards transparent + neon pink (#FF0080) border + box-shadow glow. Labels neon cyan (#00FFFF) + text-shadow glow. Buttons neon pink outline + glow. Text with moderate text-shadow halos. Urban nightlife atmosphere.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Neon, glow, neon pink, cyan, text-shadow, box-shadow, dark background, nightlife, fluorescent, luminous

description.zh: 模拟纸张和文具的质感。米白底色、纸纹噪点、虚线装饰和衬线字体，传达手工、文艺和温暖感。适合手帐App、独立书店和文创品牌。
description.en: Paper and stationery texture with warm white, serif fonts, dashed lines, and handcraft warmth.

hint.zh: 纸质风，米白底+纸纹+衬线字体+虚线装饰
hint.en: Paper, warm white + paper texture + serif font + dashed decoration

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Paper纸质风格：暖米底色(#F4EDE4)+微噪点纹理。卡片纸白底+柔和阴影+2px小圆角。衬线字体(serif)做标题。虚线(dashed)做分割线和标签装饰。焦糖色(#C1A87D)做强调。深褐色按钮。温暖的手工文具感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Paper, stationery, craft, serif, dashed lines, warm beige, parchment, handmade, cozy, analog

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Paper/stationery style: warm beige bg (#F4EDE4) + subtle noise texture. Cards paper-white + soft shadow + 2px small radius. Serif headings. Dashed lines for dividers and labels. Caramel (#C1A87D) accent. Dark brown buttons. Warm handmade stationery feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Paper, stationery, craft, serif, dashed lines, warm beige, parchment, handmade, cozy, analog

description.zh: 模拟科幻电影中的抬头显示界面。深空背景、扫描线纹理、切角边框和等宽字体。适合航天、军事科技和硬核游戏项目。
description.en: Sci-fi heads-up display with deep space black, scanlines, clip-path borders, and monospace uppercase.

hint.zh: 科幻HUD，深空黑+青色扫描线+切角边框+等宽大写
hint.en: Sci-Fi HUD, deep space black + cyan scanlines + clipped borders + monospace uppercase

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Sci-Fi HUD风格：深空黑底(#040810)+扫描线纹理(repeating-linear-gradient)。卡片透明青色+切角边框(clip-path polygon)。等宽字体+大写+大字间距(letter-spacing .1em+)。主色#00C8FF+发光效果。军事/航天科幻感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: HUD, sci-fi, heads-up display, clip-path, scanlines, cyan, monospace, uppercase, military tech, space

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Sci-Fi HUD style: deep space black bg (#040810) + scanline texture (repeating-linear-gradient). Cards transparent cyan + clip-path polygon clipped borders. Monospace + uppercase + wide letter-spacing (0.1em+). Primary #00C8FF + glow effects. Military/space sci-fi feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: HUD, sci-fi, heads-up display, clip-path, scanlines, cyan, monospace, uppercase, military tech, space

description.zh: 柔和的糖果色系和圆润造型，营造温柔治愈的视觉体验。粉蓝紫绿的低饱和搭配。适合母婴、美妆、日记和社交App。
description.en: Soft candy colors with large rounded corners and gentle colored shadows. Sweet, healing aesthetic.

hint.zh: 柔和粉彩，多色粉彩渐变+大圆角+柔和彩色阴影
hint.en: Pastel soft, multi-color pastels + large radius + soft colored shadows

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Pastel Soft柔和粉彩风格：多色粉彩渐变背景(粉→蓝→绿)。卡片白底+24px大圆角+柔和彩色阴影。粉蓝渐变按钮+20px药丸圆角。标签淡紫色背景。整体温柔治愈感，像糖果色彩。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Pastel, soft, candy colors, pink blue lavender, large border-radius, gentle shadow, cute, healing, kawaii

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Pastel Soft style: multi-color pastel gradient bg (pink→blue→green). White cards + 24px large radius + soft colored shadows. Pink-blue gradient buttons + 20px pill radius. Labels lavender bg. Gentle and healing, like candy colors.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Pastel, soft, candy colors, pink blue lavender, large border-radius, gentle shadow, cute, healing, kawaii

description.zh: 粗糙的纹理、锈蚀感和磨损效果，传达真实感和反叛态度。暗色调搭配暗红强调色。适合音乐、独立品牌和亚文化社区。
description.en: Rough textures, rust, and distressed effects conveying authenticity and rebellious attitude.

hint.zh: 做旧风，暗褐底+噪点纹理+锈红强调+无圆角+等宽
hint.en: Grunge, dark brown bg + noise texture + rust red accent + no radius + monospace

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Grunge做旧风格：暗褐底(#1C1A17)+噪点/纸纹纹理。卡片深色+细边框+无圆角。锈红色(#A83232)做强调色和按钮。等宽字体+大写标签。灰棕色文字。粗糙磨损的质感。独立摇滚/反叛态度。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Grunge, distressed, rough texture, noise, dark brown, rust red, monospace, worn, rebellious, underground

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Grunge style: dark brown bg (#1C1A17) + noise/paper grain texture. Dark cards + thin border + no radius. Rust red (#A83232) accent and buttons. Monospace + uppercase labels. Gray-brown text. Rough, worn texture. Indie rock / rebellious attitude.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Grunge, distressed, rough texture, noise, dark brown, rust red, monospace, worn, rebellious, underground

description.zh: 经典的企业级设计语言。蓝白配色、规整布局和专业气质。信任感和可靠性的视觉表达。所有商业产品的安全选择。
description.en: Classic corporate blue-white. Clean, trustworthy, professional. The safe choice for any business product.

hint.zh: 企业蓝，蓝白配色+8px圆角+细边框+专业规整
hint.en: Corporate blue, blue-white palette + 8px radius + thin borders + professional

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Corporate企业蓝风格：浅灰白底(#F0F4F8)。卡片白底+1px灰色边框+8px圆角+微阴影。蓝色(#2563EB)按钮和标签。深灰标题。清晰的信息层级。专业可靠的商务感。DM Sans或无衬线字体。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Corporate, blue-white, professional, clean, trustworthy, enterprise, business, reliable, conventional, safe

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Corporate style: light gray-white bg (#F0F4F8). White cards + 1px gray border + 8px radius + subtle shadow. Blue (#2563EB) buttons and labels. Dark gray headings. Clear info hierarchy. Professional, trustworthy business feel. DM Sans or sans-serif.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Corporate, blue-white, professional, clean, trustworthy, enterprise, business, reliable, conventional, safe

description.zh: 新粗野主义融合了粗野主义的粗黑边框和硬边阴影与明亮的糖果色系，既大胆又友好。Figma、Gumroad和Notion等科技产品的标志性设计语言。
description.en: Bold rebellion against polished digital design — candy colors, thick black borders, hard-edge shadows, and intentional roughness. Fun, irreverent, and impossible to ignore.

zh: 明亮糖果色背景(粉/黄/薰衣草)

hint.zh: 新粗野主义，糖果色+黑粗边框+硬边阴影+圆角
hint.en: Neubrutalism, candy colors + thick black borders + hard-edge shadows + rounded

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Neubrutalism风格：明亮糖果色背景(粉紫#F9E4FF)，2px黑色粗边框，4px偏移硬边阴影，12px圆角。标签用亮黄#FFE566+黑框。整体bold但friendly。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Neubrutalism, candy colors, thick borders, offset shadow, playful, bold, Figma-style

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Neubrutalism style: bright candy-colored bg (pink-purple #F9E4FF), 2px thick black borders, 4px offset hard-edge shadow, 12px border-radius. Labels bright yellow #FFE566 + black frame. Bold but friendly.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Neubrutalism, candy colors, thick borders, offset shadow, playful, bold, Figma-style

zh: 用亮色系(粉/黄/薰衣草/薄荷)

description.zh: 通过真实材质纹理、渐变高光、内阴影和3D效果模拟物理世界物体。iPhone经典时代的设计语言。皮革、金属、木纹等材质感是核心。
description.en: Digital interfaces mimicking real-world materials — leather textures, metal knobs, wooden shelves. The original iPhone UI philosophy brought to the modern web.

zh: 多重渐变模拟材质(皮革/金属)
内外阴影创造3D凸起效果

hint.zh: 拟物设计，真实材质纹理+渐变高光+内阴影
hint.en: Skeuomorphism, realistic material textures + gradient highlights + inner shadows

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Skeuomorphism拟物风格：皮革/金属质感渐变，多重box-shadow(外阴影+inset高光)。按钮用金色渐变+内高光+外阴影模拟凸起按钮。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Skeuomorphism, realistic, texture, gradient, embossed, inset shadow, leather, metal, 3D depth

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Skeuomorphism style: leather/metal texture gradients, multiple box-shadows (outer shadow + inset highlight). Buttons use gold gradient + inner highlight + outer shadow to simulate raised 3D buttons.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Skeuomorphism, realistic, texture, gradient, embossed, inset shadow, leather, metal, 3D depth

description.zh: 融合1950-70年代太空时代的乐观想象与复古美学。圆润的飞船感造型、橙色和青绿色的经典搭配、复古衬线字体。充满对未来的浪漫憧憬。
description.en: Imagining the future through a retro lens — rounded CRT screens, warm analog tones, space-age optimism. The future as envisioned in the 1960s-70s.

zh: 不对称圆角(飞船感造型)

hint.zh: 复古未来主义，橙+青绿+奶油底+不对称圆角
hint.en: Retro Futurism, orange + teal + cream base + asymmetric radius

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Retro Futurism风格：奶油色底(#FBF5E6)，橙色(#E8743A)和青绿色(#2A9D8F)双色搭配。不对称大圆角。Georgia衬线字体。50年代太空时代的浪漫乐观感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Retro futurism, space age, atomic age, teal-orange, serif, cream, 1950s, optimistic

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Retro Futurism style: cream bg (#FBF5E6), orange (#E8743A) and teal (#2A9D8F) dual-color palette. Asymmetric large border-radius. Georgia serif font. 1950s space-age romantic optimism.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Retro futurism, space age, atomic age, teal-orange, serif, cream, 1950s, optimistic

zh: 不对称圆角创造飞船感

description.zh: 灵感来自日本便当盒的网格布局设计。Apple发布会Keynote标志性风格——干净白底、柔和阴影、大圆角卡片整齐排列。适合产品展示和Dashboard。
description.en: Grid-based modular layout inspired by Japanese bento boxes. Each content piece occupies a distinct compartment with consistent gaps and rounded corners.

zh: 整齐的多尺寸网格卡片

hint.zh: 便当盒网格，Apple风格+白底+大圆角+微阴影
hint.en: Bento Box grid, Apple style + white base + large radius + subtle shadow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Bento Box风格：纯白卡片、18px大圆角、微妙阴影(0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07))。iOS蓝(#007AFF)做强调色。系统字体。多尺寸网格布局，像Apple Keynote。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Bento box, grid, Apple keynote, clean, white cards, rounded, subtle shadow, system font

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Bento Box style: pure white cards, 18px large border-radius, subtle shadow (0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07)). iOS blue (#007AFF) accent. System fonts. Multi-size grid layout, like Apple Keynote.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Bento box, grid, Apple keynote, clean, white cards, rounded, subtle shadow, system font

description.zh: 为AI产品设计的原生界面语言。深色背景搭配紫蓝渐变强调色，对话气泡式布局，流式文本动效。ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini等AI产品的共同设计基因。
description.en: Design language born from AI products — clean, spacious, conversation-first interfaces with subtle animations and trust-building visual cues.

hint.zh: AI原生界面，深黑底+紫蓝渐变+微光晕边框
hint.en: AI Native UI, deep black base + purple-blue gradient + subtle glow border

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: AI Native UI风格：深黑底(#111)，紫色(#8B5CF6)→蓝色(#3B82F6)渐变做强调。卡片有微妙紫色光晕边框。标签药丸形+半透明紫色底。ChatGPT/Claude式界面感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: AI native, dark mode, purple-blue gradient, chat bubble, conversational, LLM, streaming

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: AI Native UI style: deep black bg (#111), purple (#8B5CF6) → blue (#3B82F6) gradient accent. Cards with subtle purple glow border. Labels pill-shaped + semi-transparent purple bg. ChatGPT/Claude-style interface feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: AI native, dark mode, purple-blue gradient, chat bubble, conversational, LLM, streaming

description.zh: Apple 2025年推出的全新设计语言。比传统玻璃拟态更加通透和流动——高透明度面板、强模糊、微妙折射效果、浅灰色调底。iOS 26的标志性视觉。
description.en: Next-gen glassmorphism — liquid-like transparency with real-time reflections, chromatic aberration edges, and fluid morphing animations.

zh: 浅灰蓝色调底色+大圆角(24px+)

hint.zh: 液态玻璃，高透明+强模糊+内高光+浅灰底
hint.en: Liquid glass, high transparency + strong blur + inner highlight + light gray base

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Liquid Glass风格（Apple 2025）：浅灰蓝底色上，高透明面板(rgba(255,255,255,.45))+blur(32px)。边框白色70%不透明度。内高光(inset 0 1px white 80%)。圆角26px+。比Glassmorphism更通透。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Liquid glass, Apple 2025, iOS 26, translucent, frosted, high blur, inset highlight, soft, refraction

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Liquid Glass style (Apple 2025): light gray-blue base, high-transparency panels (rgba(255,255,255,.45)) + blur(32px). Border white 70% opacity. Inner highlight (inset 0 1px white 80%). Border-radius 26px+. More translucent than Glassmorphism.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Liquid glass, Apple 2025, iOS 26, translucent, frosted, high blur, inset highlight, soft, refraction

description.zh: VisionOS和XR设备的界面设计语言。多层半透明面板在3D空间中漂浮，超大圆角、极深Z轴阴影、背景磨砂。为空间计算时代设计。
description.en: Interfaces designed for spatial computing (AR/VR) — floating translucent panels in 3D space with depth, parallax, and hand-gesture affordances.

zh: 多层漂浮面板(不同深度)

hint.zh: 空间界面，多层漂浮+超大圆角+极深阴影+强模糊
hint.en: Spatial UI, multi-layer floating + extra-large radius + deep shadows + heavy blur

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Spatial UI风格（VisionOS）：浅灰底色，面板rgba(255,255,255,.35)+blur(40px)。超大圆角28px+。多层box-shadow模拟Z轴深度(0 20px 60px)。内边距32px+。面板间有明显的层次关系。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Spatial UI, VisionOS, XR, floating panels, z-depth, large radius, heavy blur, layered

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Spatial UI style (VisionOS): light gray base, panels rgba(255,255,255,.35) + blur(40px). Extra-large radius 28px+. Multi-layer box-shadow simulating z-depth (0 20px 60px). Padding 32px+. Clear panel layering.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Spatial UI, VisionOS, XR, floating panels, z-depth, large radius, heavy blur, layered

description.zh: 使用3D渲染风格的视觉元素创造超真实的数字界面。大胆的彩色阴影、立体按钮效果、鲜艳渐变。像从Blender里直接搬出来的UI。
description.en: Hyper-realistic 3D rendered elements integrated into web design — glossy materials, dramatic lighting, and volumetric objects floating in UI.

hint.zh: 3D超写实，彩色阴影+立体按钮+鲜艳渐变+大圆角
hint.en: 3D Hyperrealism, colored shadows + 3D buttons + vibrant gradients + large radius

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 3D Hyperrealism风格：白色卡片+22px大圆角。关键是彩色阴影（不是灰色，而是主色系的半透明阴影）。按钮用渐变+底部硬阴影模拟3D按压效果。鲜艳的多色渐变装饰条。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: 3D hyperrealism, colored shadow, vibrant gradient, depth, Blender-style, thick shadow, playful

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: 3D Hyperrealism style: white cards + 22px large radius. Key: colored shadows (not gray — semi-transparent in primary color). Buttons gradient + bottom hard shadow for 3D press effect. Vibrant multi-color gradient accent bars.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: 3D hyperrealism, colored shadow, vibrant gradient, depth, Blender-style, thick shadow, playful

description.zh: 专为OLED屏幕优化的纯黑界面设计。背景使用真正的#000000黑色以节省电量，高对比白色文字，极少的彩色点缀。比普通暗色模式更极致、更纯粹。
description.en: Pure black backgrounds (#000) designed for OLED screens — pixels-off black, vibrant accent colors, and high-contrast minimal elements.

hint.zh: OLED纯黑，纯黑底+高对比白字+极少蓝色点缀
hint.en: OLED pure black, pure black base + high contrast white text + minimal blue accent

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: OLED Dark风格：纯黑背景#000（不是深灰！）。白色文字#fff。极细边框1px #1A1A1A。强调色只用iOS蓝(#0A84FF)，极少使用。整体极致克制纯净。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: OLED, pure black, high contrast, minimal color, #000, energy saving, iOS dark

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: OLED Dark style: pure black bg #000 (not dark gray!). White text #fff. Ultra-thin borders 1px #1A1A1A. Accent only iOS blue (#0A84FF), used sparingly. Extremely restrained and pure.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: OLED, pure black, high contrast, minimal color, #000, energy saving, iOS dark

description.zh: 以动画和过渡效果为核心的设计语言。倾斜角度、渐变能量条、动感配色传达出"一切都在运动中"的感觉。适合创意工具、运动品牌、娱乐产品。
description.en: Motion as a core design principle — every transition, every state change, every scroll event triggers purposeful, choreographed animations.

hint.zh: 动效驱动，微倾斜+红橙渐变+动感能量条+彩色投影
hint.en: Motion driven, micro-tilt + red-orange gradient + dynamic energy bar + colored shadows

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Motion Driven风格：白色卡片微倾斜(skewY -1deg)。红→橙渐变做能量条和按钮。彩色投影(不是灰色阴影)。一切设计暗示"运动中"——倾斜、渐变、动感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Motion driven, animation, skew, energetic, gradient, dynamic, red-orange, velocity

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Motion Driven style: white cards slightly tilted (skewY -1deg). Red→orange gradient for energy bars and buttons. Colored shadows (not gray). Everything suggests "in motion" — tilt, gradient, dynamism.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Motion driven, animation, skew, energetic, gradient, dynamic, red-orange, velocity

description.zh: 以巨大的动态文字作为核心设计元素。深色背景上超大、超粗的白色标题主导视觉，红色强调线贯穿。文字即设计，排版即交互。
description.en: Typography in motion — letters that split, morph, bounce, and dance. The typeface IS the animation, creating mesmerizing text-based experiences.

hint.zh: 动态字体，深黑底+巨大白字+红色线+极简
hint.en: Kinetic typography, deep black base + oversized white text + red line + ultra-minimal

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Kinetic Typography风格：深黑底(#111)。标题用32px+ 900weight的超大粗体白字，letter-spacing负值让字母紧凑。红色(#FF3300)全宽装饰线。标签用红色大写+超大字间距。几乎没有装饰元素。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Kinetic typography, oversized text, bold, animated text, dark, editorial, red accent, weight 900

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Kinetic Typography style: deep black bg (#111). Headings 32px+ 900-weight oversized bold white, negative letter-spacing for tight letters. Red (#FF3300) full-width accent line. Labels red uppercase + extra-wide letter-spacing. Almost no decorative elements.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Kinetic typography, oversized text, bold, animated text, dark, editorial, red accent, weight 900

description.zh: 以滚动叙事为核心的设计语言。温暖的奶油色调、优雅的衬线字体、极致留白。每一屏都是一个故事章节，滚动即翻页。
description.en: Multi-layered scrolling storytelling — foreground and background move at different speeds creating cinematic depth and narrative-driven experiences.

hint.zh: 视差叙事，奶油色调+衬线字体+极致留白+金棕细线
hint.en: Parallax storytelling, cream tones + serif font + generous whitespace + gold-brown lines

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Parallax Storytelling风格：温暖奶油底(#F2ECE4)。Cormorant Garamond衬线字体做标题(26px+)。金棕色(#C8A87A)细线做分隔。大量留白。描述用斜体。按钮只是一条下划线。整体像阅读一本精美的散文集。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Parallax, storytelling, scroll, serif, warm, cream, editorial, narrative, chapter, elegant

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Parallax Storytelling style: warm cream bg (#F2ECE4). Cormorant Garamond serif headings (26px+). Gold-brown (#C8A87A) thin line dividers. Generous whitespace. Descriptions italic. Buttons just an underline. Like reading a beautifully typeset essay collection.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Parallax, storytelling, scroll, serif, warm, cream, editorial, narrative, chapter, elegant

en: Pin and reveal content on scroll

description.zh: 模拟电子墨水屏(Kindle/Remarkable)的低对比度、无装饰界面。暖灰纸张色底色、衬线字体、零阴影零圆角。阅读优先的极致克制设计。
description.en: E-ink display aesthetic — paper-like warmth, high contrast black on cream, minimal chrome, and the quiet elegance of electronic paper.

hint.zh: 电子墨水，暖灰纸色+零阴影+衬线体+零圆角
hint.en: E-ink, warm gray paper + zero shadows + serif + zero radius

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: E-Ink Digital风格：暖灰底(#F9F6F0)。Georgia衬线字体。零阴影零装饰。边框1px #D8D0C4。标签用IBM Plex Mono等宽体+大写+大字间距。按钮纯黑底白字无圆角。像Kindle阅读器的界面。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: E-ink, Kindle, paper, warm gray, serif, no shadow, minimal, reading, zero decoration

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: E-Ink Digital style: warm gray bg (#F9F6F0). Georgia serif font. Zero shadows, zero decoration. Borders 1px #D8D0C4. Labels IBM Plex Mono monospace + uppercase + wide letter-spacing. Buttons solid black bg white text no radius. Like a Kindle reader interface.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: E-ink, Kindle, paper, warm gray, serif, no shadow, minimal, reading, zero decoration

description.zh: 通过RGB色差偏移效果创造故障和视觉失真感。深色底上红青双色文字阴影偏移，模拟光学透镜的色差现象。赛博/故障/实验性设计的利器。
description.en: Pure color as the primary design element — bold monochromatic or dichromatic schemes where color saturation drives the entire visual experience.

hint.zh: 色差分离，深黑底+红青RGB偏移+等宽体+故障感
hint.en: Chromatic aberration, deep black base + red-cyan RGB offset + monospace + glitch feel

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Chromatic Aberration风格：深黑底(#0A0A10)。标题用text-shadow: 2px 0 rgba(255,51,0,.5), -2px 0 rgba(0,255,255,.5)制造RGB色差。等宽字体+大写。红(#FF3300)和青(#00FFFF)双色体系。按钮青色边框+红色text-shadow。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Chromatic aberration, RGB split, glitch, red-cyan, monospace, dark, experimental, lens distortion

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Chromatic Aberration style: deep black bg (#0A0A10). Title uses text-shadow: 2px 0 rgba(255,51,0,.5), -2px 0 rgba(0,255,255,.5) for RGB split. Monospace + uppercase. Red (#FF3300) and cyan (#00FFFF) dual-color system. Buttons cyan border + red text-shadow.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Chromatic aberration, RGB split, glitch, red-cyan, monospace, dark, experimental, lens distortion

description.zh: 灵感来自胶片摄影和模拟设备的暖色调美学。暗金色调、做旧质感、衬线字体和微妙的内发光营造怀旧感。适合音乐、摄影、咖啡等品牌。
description.en: Aged, nostalgic aesthetic with sepia tones, distressed textures, retro typography, and the warmth of analog photography and print.

zh: 温暖棕金色调(暗金/赭石/琥珀)
微妙的内发光和噪点感

hint.zh: 复古胶片，暖棕金色调+衬线体+内发光+做旧
hint.en: Vintage analog, warm brown-gold tones + serif + inner glow + aged feel

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Vintage Analog风格：暖奶油底(#F5E8CC)。棕金色系(#C4A060/#8B5E3C)。Cormorant Garamond衬线字体。分隔线用淡入淡出渐变。按钮用金色渐变模拟金属质感。描述文字斜体。整体营造胶片摄影般的温暖怀旧感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Vintage, analog, film, warm, sepia, gold-brown, serif, nostalgic, retro, grain

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Vintage Analog style: warm cream bg (#F5E8CC). Brown-gold palette (#C4A060/#8B5E3C). Cormorant Garamond serif font. Dividers use fade-in/out gradient. Buttons gold gradient simulating metal. Descriptions italic. Warm nostalgic film photography feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Vintage, analog, film, warm, sepia, gold-brown, serif, nostalgic, retro, grain

description.zh: 通过多层半透明面板在深色背景上堆叠，创造丰富的Z轴深度和维度感。每一层都有不同的透明度和模糊度，光蓝和淡紫做点缀。
description.en: Subtle depth through semi-transparent overlapping layers on dark backgrounds — like looking through tinted glass panes stacked in space.

hint.zh: 维度层叠，深蓝底+多层阴影+半透明面板+蓝紫光
hint.en: Dimensional layering, deep blue base + multi-layer shadows + translucent panels + blue-purple glow

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Dimensional Layering风格：深蓝紫渐变背景(#1A1A2E→#0F3460)。面板半透明(rgba白色6%)+blur(20px)。关键是多层box-shadow(至少3层)模拟不同深度。浅蓝(#4FC3F7)和淡紫(#CE93D8)做强调色。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Dimensional, layering, z-depth, multi-shadow, translucent, dark, navy, blue-purple, stacked

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Dimensional Layering style: deep blue-purple gradient bg (#1A1A2E→#0F3460). Panels semi-transparent (rgba white 6%) + blur(20px). Key: multi-layer box-shadow (3+ layers) simulating different depths. Light blue (#4FC3F7) and lavender (#CE93D8) accents.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Dimensional, layering, z-depth, multi-shadow, translucent, dark, navy, blue-purple, stacked

description.zh: 极简主义的极端演绎——几乎空无一物的纯白页面上，一个戏剧性的超大元素打破宁静。极细的细线、极大的字号对比、极少的颜色。
description.en: Extreme minimalism — nearly empty white pages with one dramatic oversized element breaking the silence. Ultra-thin lines, extreme font size contrast, zero color.

hint.zh: 夸张极简，纯白+零装饰+超大标题+极细线
hint.en: Exaggerated minimalism, pure white + zero decoration + oversized title + hairline

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Exaggerated Minimalism风格：纯白背景，零阴影零边框零圆角。标题用36px+ 800weight超大粗体。辅助文字极小(8-10px)且极浅灰色(#CCC)。按钮只是一条下划线。分隔线几乎不可见(#F0F0F0)。大小对比是唯一的设计手段。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Exaggerated minimalism, ultra-white, oversized title, hairline, contrast, void, dramatic, empty

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Exaggerated Minimalism style: pure white bg, zero shadows, zero borders, zero radius. Headings 36px+ 800-weight oversized bold. Secondary text extremely small (8-10px) very light gray (#CCC). Buttons just an underline. Dividers nearly invisible (#F0F0F0). Size contrast is the only design tool.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Exaggerated minimalism, ultra-white, oversized title, hairline, contrast, void, dramatic, empty

zh: 超大标题对比极小辅助文字
en: Oversized title vs tiny secondary text

description.zh: 用大面积纯色色块构建页面结构，每个区块一个鲜明的颜色。没有渐变、没有阴影——纯粹靠色彩的碰撞和对比创造视觉冲击力。像Mondrian的画一样，用矩形色块拼贴出整个界面。
description.en: Bold solid color blocks building page structure — each section one vivid color. No gradients, no shadows — pure chromatic collision and contrast.

hint.zh: 活力色块，大面积纯色+硬边拼接+粗体文字
hint.en: Vibrant blocks, large solid color sections + hard-edge joins + bold text

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Vibrant Block Based风格：用大面积纯色色块(#FF6B35橙、#004E89蓝、#FCBF49黄)构建布局。每个section一个颜色，色块之间硬边衔接无过渡。文字用粗体白色或黑色。零渐变零阴影，纯平面设计。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Vibrant blocks, color sections, flat, bold, Mondrian, primary colors, hard edges, sectioned layout

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Vibrant Block Based style: large solid color blocks (#FF6B35 orange, #004E89 blue, #FCBF49 yellow) build the layout. Each section one color, hard-edge joins no transitions. Text bold white or black. Zero gradients, zero shadows, pure flat design.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Vibrant blocks, color sections, flat, bold, Mondrian, primary colors, hard edges, sectioned layout

description.zh: Neumorphism的进化版——保留了柔和的内外阴影和凸起/凹陷效果，但加入了更多色彩层次和微妙的渐变。比传统拟态更实用，更注重可访问性，同时保持那种"从界面中长出来"的质感。
description.en: Evolved neumorphism — soft inner/outer shadows with added color depth and subtle gradients. More usable than classic neumorphism, with accessible tactile feel.

hint.zh: 柔性UI，双阴影+凸起凹陷+柔和渐变+高圆角
hint.en: Soft UI, dual shadows + emboss/deboss + soft gradient + large radius

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Soft UI Evolution风格：浅灰蓝背景(#E8EDF5)上用双层box-shadow创造凸起效果(亮影#F0F4FA在左上，暗影#D1D9E6在右下)。圆角16px+。按钮用凸起效果，输入框用凹陷效果(inset shadow)。整体色调柔和统一。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Soft UI, neumorphism evolved, dual shadow, emboss, deboss, pillow effect, accessible, subtle gradient

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Soft UI Evolution style: light gray-blue bg (#E8EDF5) with dual box-shadow creating raised effect (light #F0F4FA top-left, dark #D1D9E6 bottom-right). Border-radius 16px+. Buttons raised, inputs recessed (inset shadow). Tone soft and unified.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Soft UI, neumorphism evolved, dual shadow, emboss, deboss, pillow effect, accessible, subtle gradient

en: Emboss for buttons, deboss for inputs

description.zh: 为TikTok一代设计——故意打破所有传统排版规则。歪斜的文字、随机的贴纸、荧光撞色、meme式的表情包混搭。看起来像一个精心策划的"混乱"，每个元素都在尖叫着争夺注意力，但整体却奇妙地和谐。
description.en: Designed for the TikTok generation — deliberately breaking all layout rules. Tilted text, random stickers, neon clashes, meme-style emoji mashups.

zh: 手写+像素+衬线字体混搭

hint.zh: Z世代混沌，荧光撞色+歪斜元素+贴纸装饰+字体混搭
hint.en: Gen Z chaos, neon clashes + tilted elements + sticker decorations + mixed fonts

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Gen Z Chaos Maximalism风格：荧光色系(品红#FF00FF、荧光绿#00FF88、电光黄#FFE600)随机撞色。元素带1-3度随机旋转。黑色粗边框+彩色阴影偏移。到处散落emoji和贴纸装饰。字体大小极端对比，混搭手写、像素和衬线体。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Gen Z, chaos, maximalism, neon clash, stickers, emoji, tilted, meme aesthetic, TikTok, anti-design

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Gen Z Chaos Maximalism style: neon colors (magenta #FF00FF, neon green #00FF88, electric yellow #FFE600) randomly clashing. Elements tilted 1-3 degrees. Thick black borders + colored shadow offset. Emoji sticker decorations everywhere. Extreme font size contrast, mixing handwritten, pixel, and serif fonts.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Gen Z, chaos, maximalism, neon clash, stickers, emoji, tilted, meme aesthetic, TikTok, anti-design

description.zh: 故意保留"未完成"感的设计——裸露的代码片段、未裁剪的图片边缘、手绘线条替代精确图形。这种"反设计"美学是对过度精致的数字世界的一种反叛，强调真实性和人味。
description.en: Deliberately "unfinished" design — exposed code snippets, uncropped image edges, hand-drawn lines replacing precise shapes. Anti-design rebellion emphasizing authenticity.

hint.zh: 反精致，手绘线条+粗糙边缘+裸露结构+等宽字体
hint.en: Anti-polish, hand-drawn lines + rough edges + exposed structure + monospace

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Anti-Polish Raw风格：暖白纸色背景(#F5F0EB)上用虚线边框(dashed)和手绘感线条。字体用Courier New等宽体。图片不裁剪，保留粗糙边缘。无圆角无阴影。露出网格线和参考线。颜色极少，主要靠黑白+一个棕褐色(#8B7355)点缀。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Anti-polish, raw, unfinished, hand-drawn, rough edges, exposed grid, monospace, authentic, rebellion

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Anti-Polish Raw style: warm paper-white bg (#F5F0EB) with dashed borders and hand-drawn feel. Courier New monospace. Images uncropped, rough edges. No radius, no shadows. Expose grid lines and guides. Minimal color: black-white + one tan accent (#8B7355).

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Anti-polish, raw, unfinished, hand-drawn, rough edges, exposed grid, monospace, authentic, rebellion

description.zh: 让数字界面"可触摸"——通过纹理、材质感和微妙的物理反馈模拟真实触感。纸张的纤维纹理、织物的编织感、木材的纹路……每个表面都有独特的触觉暗示，让用户不由自主想伸手去摸屏幕。
description.en: Making digital interfaces "touchable" — paper fibers, woven fabric textures, wood grain. Every surface has a unique tactile hint that makes you want to reach out.

hint.zh: 触感数字，纹理表面+材质色调+微妙凹凸+温暖质感
hint.en: Tactile digital, textured surfaces + material tones + subtle emboss + warm feel

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Tactile Digital风格：亚麻白底(#F7F3EE)加微妙纸张纹理(noise SVG或CSS grain)。边框用砂石色(#D4C5B2)。卡片有微弱阴影模拟凸起感。色调温暖：皮革棕(#8B7355)、深木色(#3D3027)。字体用衬线体(Source Serif)增强印刷质感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Tactile, texture, paper grain, fabric, warm materials, emboss, physical, haptic, organic surface

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Tactile Digital style: linen white bg (#F7F3EE) + subtle paper texture (noise SVG or CSS grain). Borders sandstone (#D4C5B2). Cards with slight shadow for raised feel. Warm tones: leather brown (#8B7355), dark wood (#3D3027). Serif font (Source Serif) for print feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Tactile, texture, paper grain, fabric, warm materials, emboss, physical, haptic, organic surface

description.zh: 用复杂的多点渐变和网格叠加创造流动、梦幻的视觉效果。不是简单的双色渐变，而是像被风吹散的颜料一样，多种色彩在空间中自然融合。配合半透明层和模糊效果，营造深邃的空间感。
description.en: Complex multi-point gradients with mesh overlays creating flowing, dreamy visuals. Not simple two-color gradients — colors blend naturally like wind-blown paint.

hint.zh: 渐变网格，多点渐变+半透明层+模糊效果+流动色彩
hint.en: Gradient mesh, multi-point gradients + translucent layers + blur + flowing colors

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Gradient Mesh风格：用多点渐变背景(靛蓝#667EEA→深紫#764BA2→粉紫#F093FB)。卡片半透明白色+backdrop-filter blur(8px)。边框用rgba白色(0.2透明度)。阴影带渐变主色调。圆角20px。整体如梦如幻的色彩流动感。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Gradient mesh, multi-stop gradient, aurora, flowing colors, blur, translucent, dreamy, vibrant depth

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Gradient Mesh style: multi-point gradient bg (indigo #667EEA → deep purple #764BA2 → pink-purple #F093FB). Cards semi-transparent white + backdrop-filter blur(8px). Borders rgba white (0.2). Shadows tinted with primary colors. Border-radius 20px. Dreamy flowing color feel.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Gradient mesh, multi-stop gradient, aurora, flowing colors, blur, translucent, dreamy, vibrant depth

description.zh: 以逼真的3D产品渲染为核心，界面围绕产品的三维展示而设计。深色背景衬托产品的高光和阴影，悬浮效果强调产品的立体感。适合科技产品、汽车、奢侈品等需要展示工艺细节的场景。
description.en: Photo-realistic 3D product renders as the centerpiece — dark backgrounds highlighting reflections and shadows, floating effects emphasizing depth.

hint.zh: 3D产品展示，深色背景+高光阴影+悬浮效果+电影光影
hint.en: 3D product preview, dark bg + specular highlights + floating effect + cinematic lighting

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: 3D Product Preview风格：深黑背景(#0A0A0A)上产品3D渲染图悬浮居中。微弱的rgba白色边框(0.08)。巨大的阴影(0 20px 60px)模拟悬浮。文字用银灰(#E0E0E0)。点缀色用科技蓝(#00D4FF)做CTA和高光。圆角16px。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: 3D product, dark stage, floating, cinematic lighting, hero render, deep shadow, tech showcase, premium

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: 3D Product Preview style: deep black bg (#0A0A0A), product 3D render floating center. Subtle rgba white border (0.08). Large shadow (0 20px 60px) for floating effect. Text silver gray (#E0E0E0). Accent tech blue (#00D4FF) for CTAs. Border-radius 16px.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: 3D product, dark stage, floating, cinematic lighting, hero render, deep shadow, tech showcase, premium

description.zh: 光标不再只是一个箭头——它成为设计的一部分。自定义光标形状、光标跟随动画、鼠标悬停时的涟漪/磁吸/变形效果。整个页面就是一个交互游乐场，用户的每一次鼠标移动都会触发视觉反馈。
description.en: The cursor becomes part of the design — custom shapes, follow animations, magnetic hover effects, motion trails. The whole page is an interactive playground.

hint.zh: 交互光标，自定义光标+跟随动画+磁吸效果+轨迹视觉化
hint.en: Interactive cursor, custom cursor + follow animation + magnetic effect + trail

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Interactive Cursor风格：深黑背景(#1A1A1A)。隐藏默认光标(cursor:none)，用JS自定义圆形光标。光标跟随用lerp缓动。悬停按钮时光标放大+变色(信号红#FF4444)。留下微妙的鼠标轨迹。元素在鼠标接近时微微"磁吸"偏移。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Custom cursor, magnetic hover, follow animation, trail, interactive, playful, motion, mouse tracking

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Interactive Cursor style: deep black bg (#1A1A1A). Hide default cursor (cursor:none), custom circular cursor via JS. Cursor follows with lerp easing. Enlarges + changes color on button hover (signal red #FF4444). Subtle mouse trail. Elements "magnetically" shift when mouse approaches.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Custom cursor, magnetic hover, follow animation, trail, interactive, playful, motion, mouse tracking

zh: 不要过度动画导致晕眩

description.zh: 魔鬼在细节中——每一个按钮点击、每一次页面滚动、每一个状态变化都伴随着精心设计的微小动画。加载时的骨架屏闪烁、切换开关的弹性回弹、计数器的滚动数字。这些0.2秒的小惊喜让整个产品感觉"活着"。
description.en: Devil in the details — every button click, scroll event, and state change has a carefully crafted micro-animation. Skeleton screens, spring bounces, rolling numbers.

hint.zh: 微交互，状态动画+弹性缓动+骨架屏+悬停反馈
hint.en: Micro interactions, state animations + spring easing + skeleton screens + hover feedback

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Micro Interactions风格：极浅灰背景(#FAFBFC)。每个可交互元素都有transition(.2s cubic-bezier)。按钮hover时微微上移+加深阴影。开关用spring动画。数字变化用滚动效果。加载用骨架屏shimmer。边框浅灰(#E1E4E8)，圆角6px。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Micro interactions, spring animation, skeleton screen, hover feedback, transition, cubic-bezier, alive UI

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Micro Interactions style: ultra-light gray bg (#FAFBFC). Every interactive element has transition (.2s cubic-bezier). Buttons shift up + deepen shadow on hover. Toggles use spring animation. Numbers use rolling effect. Loading uses skeleton shimmer. Borders #E1E4E8, radius 6px.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Micro interactions, spring animation, skeleton screen, hover feedback, transition, cubic-bezier, alive UI

description.zh: 最好的界面是没有界面——内容即界面，交互即界面。去掉所有UI chrome(导航栏、侧边栏、按钮边框)，让内容直接与用户对话。通过手势、语音、上下文感知自动呈现所需信息，像一个隐形的智能助手。
description.en: The best interface is no interface — content IS the interface. Remove all UI chrome (navbars, sidebars, button borders) and let content speak directly.

hint.zh: 零界面，无UI装饰+内容即界面+手势驱动+上下文感知
hint.en: Zero interface, no UI decoration + content as interface + gesture-driven + context-aware

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Zero Interface风格：纯白背景，零装饰。没有可见的导航栏——通过手势或滚动触发。没有按钮边框——文字本身就是按钮。没有卡片——内容直接呈现。字体用系统字体(SF Pro)。颜色只有黑(#111)、白(#FFF)、灰(#999)。一切UI痕迹都被消除。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Zero UI, invisible interface, content-first, no chrome, gesture-driven, ambient, contextual, disappearing UI

en.title: Basic Prompt
en.text: Zero Interface style: pure white bg, zero decoration. No visible navbar — triggered by gesture or scroll. No button borders — text itself is the button. No cards — content presented directly. System font (SF Pro). Colors only black (#111), white (#FFF), gray (#999). All UI traces eliminated.

en.title: Keywords
en.text: Zero UI, invisible interface, content-first, no chrome, gesture-driven, ambient, contextual, disappearing UI

description.zh: 抛弃纯白背景的新一代 SaaS 美学——米黄基调 + 暖色系深棕 + 小衬线 + 温和阴影。既保留 SaaS 的干净结构，又摆脱"AI 味"的冷感。Cursor、Attio、Rewind、Read.cv 都在用这条路线。

zh: 米色/奶油底色 (#F5F1EA/#F7F3EB) 取代纯白

hint.zh: Cream SaaS，米色底 + 小衬线 + 暖棕强调

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Cream SaaS 风格：整站背景不用纯白，改成 #F5F1EA 米色。卡片用略浅的 #F7F3EB。标题小衬线（Fraunces / Söhne / Reckless），正文可搭配 Inter。强调色一个暖棕 #8A6E4D。整体给"quiet luxury"感。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Cream SaaS Landing：hero 米黄大标题 + 短衬线小 tag + 单一 CTA（深黑填充 pill 按钮）。cards 用非常轻的阴影 0 1px 2px rgba(139,110,77,.06)。避免灰色边框，用略深米色分隔。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Cream, warm white, off-white, quiet luxury, small serif, Fraunces, warm brown accent, no pure white, Attio, Cursor

zh: 背景用米色/奶油而非纯白
不要 SaaS 蓝紫渐变

description.zh: 柔和渐变 + SVG 噪点覆盖，模拟胶片印刷的颗粒质感。让数字界面看起来像有物理触感，2024–2025 大量顶级科技公司选择的"温暖版渐变"。Anthropic、Vercel blog、Framer templates 都是这套。

zh: 衬线大标题 + 轻阴影卡片

hint.zh: 颗粒渐变，柔渐变 + SVG 噪点 + 衬线

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Grainy Gradient 风格：hero 背景 135deg 米色到暖灰的柔渐变，叠加一层 SVG turbulence noise（opacity .4, mix-blend-mode:multiply）。标题用 Fraunces 大衬线。强调色 #E85D4E 橙红。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Anthropic 风：整站米暖底 + 全局颗粒噪点。hero 用大衬线 headline + 简短 tagline。CTA pill 按钮橙红。次要卡片用 rgba(255,253,248,.85) + backdrop-blur 让颗粒透出。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Grainy, noise texture, feTurbulence, warm gradient, film grain, Anthropic style, Fraunces, warm orange accent

description.zh: 把"杂志排版"和"SaaS 商用"合二为一：巨大 display serif hero + 极小 mono chip + 大量白空间 + 单一强烈品牌色。让 landing page 看起来像 NYT 或 The Verge 的深度报道，但功能上是产品官网。Notion 2025、Cursor、Perplexity、Linear Method 都在这条路线。

zh: 巨大 display serif 标题（Fraunces/Playfair）
白/米背景 + 单一强 accent（如 #0038FF）
衬线-sans 混排：headline 衬线、body Inter

hint.zh: 编辑级 SaaS，大衬线 + mono chip + 单一强色

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Editorial SaaS 风格：hero 用超大 Fraunces / Playfair 衬线 headline（60-96px），line-height 1.05。上方一个 8-9px mono chip 作 eyebrow。CTA 一个方形 filled 电蓝按钮 #0038FF。body 用 Inter 13-14px。整站白/米背景。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Notion / Cursor 官网风：navbar 极简 + logo + 4 个链接。hero 一个 5-6 词衬线大标题 + 一句 tagline + 单个 CTA。section 之间用 Fraunces 大字号衬线分隔。所有 chip / meta 一律 mono。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Editorial SaaS, display serif, big headline, mono eyebrow, Fraunces, Notion 2025, Cursor, Perplexity, publication meets product

description.zh: 暗色底 + 单点柔和光晕（radial gradient + blur）+ 极细 typography。电影感，而不是 cyberpunk 的荧光 UI 感。Rive、Linear Method、Framer promo 页都在用这种"氛围光"。

zh: 浅色 300-400 字重、衬线或极简 sans

hint.zh: 环境光，暗底 + 柔光晕 + 极细字

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Ambient Glow 风格：背景 #0F0E12 近黑。hero 中央加一个 radial-gradient 光晕（粉+青，blur 40px, opacity .35）。文字用衬线 300 weight 或 Inter 200-300。所有边框 rgba(255,255,255,.08)。CTA pill 按钮半透明。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Rive 官网风：整站极暗背景。每 section 一个不同颜色的柔光光晕（顶部粉、中部青、底部橙）。文字全部极细 weight。零硬边、零锐角。cards 用 rgba(255,255,255,.03) + backdrop-blur。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Ambient, glow, radial gradient, soft blur, cinematic, Rive, Linear Method, dark but not cyber, thin type

description.zh: 工程蓝图 / 机械 spec sheet 美学：细网格底 + 全等宽字体 + 技术标注（尺寸、编号、坐标）+ 单一警报色。让 landing page 看起来像 CAD 图纸或产品规格手册。Physical Intelligence、1x Technologies、Neuralink、Rivian 硬件页面都在用。

zh: 米/白底 + 淡色细网格线（20px 一格）
全部 IBM Plex Mono / JetBrains Mono
技术标注：SPEC-01, REV-A2 之类的编号
单一警报色（橙红或亮橙）

hint.zh: 技术规格，细网格 + 等宽 + 技术标注

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Spec Sheet 风格：背景 #F4F1EC 米色 + 细网格线（rgba(10,10,10,.05), 20px grid）。所有文字用 IBM Plex Mono。边框 1px 黑色实线，零圆角。加技术编号 SPEC-01 / REV-A2 / FIG-3 作 chip。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Neuralink / 1x 硬件页面风：hero 一张产品的技术剖面图（可用 SVG stroke），旁边标注 mm 尺寸、序号、部件名。表格全 mono、无斑马纹、只有细横线分割。CTA 一个方形边框按钮 "> DOWNLOAD SPEC"。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Spec sheet, technical drawing, blueprint, engineering, monospace, grid, Physical Intelligence, 1x, Neuralink, Rivian tech

description.zh: 纯字符组成的视觉——字符不是文本，字符是"图"。终端 nostalgia 复兴，README 装饰的极致，Neal.fun / Every.to / 独立 hackers 的最爱。和 terminal 风格不同：terminal 是"CLI 的 UI 化"，ASCII 是"字符当图形用"。

zh: 纯 IBM Plex Mono / Fira Code
磷光绿 #00FF41 底黑 + 琥珀 #FFB000 高亮
dashed / dotted 边框、无圆角、方括号装饰

hint.zh: ASCII 艺术，字符构图 + dashed 边框 + 绿字黑底

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: ASCII Art 风格：深黑背景 #0A0A0A。所有文字磷光绿 #00FF41 (IBM Plex Mono)。装饰用大段 ASCII 字符：▓▓▒▒░░ 作分隔、━━━━ 作横线、┌───┐ 作 box。琥珀色 #FFB000 作次要强调。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Neal.fun / Every 独立博客风：hero 用一大段 ASCII art logo（几十字符构成图案）。navigation 用 [ ITEM ] 方括号。button 前加 > 箭头。所有边框 dashed 或 dotted。加一行 [SYS] 状态条在底部。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: ASCII art, character art, monospace, terminal aesthetic, phosphor green, hacker, Neal.fun, retro computing, no images just characters

description.zh: 19 世纪印刷术美学：深酒红/墨绿底 + 烫金 + 花体衬线（Playfair Bold Italic）+ 装饰性花纹。和 Art Deco 不同：Art Deco 是几何 luxury，Victorian 是曲线花体 luxury。Aesop、Loewe、独立文学网站、精品古董商都在用。

hint.zh: 维多利亚，酒红深底 + 烫金花体 + 装饰符号

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Victorian Ornate 风格：深酒红 #2A0F14 底 + 烫金 #C9A961 边框和分隔线。标题用 Playfair Display Black Italic 900 号。装饰用 ❦ · ✧ 等花体符号。文字用奶油米 #F5E6C8。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Aesop / Loewe 精品商店风：hero 深底 + 单一花体大标题（意大利斜体）+ 烫金细节。产品卡片有装饰性花纹 border。CTA 烫金 pill 或方形，字用 italic serif。整体像 19 世纪印刷广告。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Victorian, ornate, gold on burgundy, Playfair Display, filigree, decorative serif, 19th century, Aesop, luxury, italic

zh: 不要几何形状（那是 Art Deco）

description.zh: 1950s-60s 美国中世纪现代设计：青绿 + 橙 + 芥末黄 + 星芒 + boomerang 形状 + Futura。填 retfut（70s Space Age）之前的 50s-60s 空缺。Kirby Ferguson 视频、大众 Beetle 60s 广告、Mad Men 片头都是这套。

zh: 青绿 #1A9EB3 + 橙 #E85D3C 双主色

hint.zh: 原子时代，青橙双色 + 米黄底 + Poppins/Futura + 星芒

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Atomic Age 风格：米黄底 #F5E6D3。青绿 #1A9EB3 + 橙红 #E85D3C 双主色。字体 Futura / Poppins 全大写粗体。装饰用星芒 ✦ 和圆形（原子模型）。硬边阴影 box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 #1A9EB3。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Kirby Ferguson / 60s 广告风：hero 一个 Futura Black 大标题（全大写）+ 星芒装饰。cards 有偏移硬阴影（青绿或橙）。按钮矩形无圆角、粗字体、大写字母。加一个大的 boomerang 或圆形装饰在背景。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Atomic Age, mid-century modern, 1950s, 1960s, Futura, teal and orange, boomerang, starburst, Kirby Ferguson, Mad Men

description.zh: Punk 复印机 DIY 美学：高对比黑白 + 剪纸拼贴 + 手写涂鸦 + 故意的旋转和错位。和 grunge 不同：grunge 是深色摇滚音质感，zine 是复印机 photocopy + cut-and-paste。90s Riot Grrrl 传单、当代 Substack Notes、独立艺术家页面都是这套。

zh: 旋转 -2° 到 +2° 制造错位感
橙红警报色 + 手绘感 dashed 线

hint.zh: Zine 风，黑白高对比 + 旋转错位 + Impact/Courier

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Zine / Xerox 风格：米白背景 #F5F5F0。所有卡片和 chip 都轻微旋转（-2° 到 +2°）。字体 Impact 大标题 + Courier 正文。橙红 #FF3B00 只作警报。cards 有粗黑边框 + 硬阴影。整体像被复印机复印过一次。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Riot Grrrl / Substack Notes 独立风：hero 一个 Impact 900 大标题（旋转 .4°）+ 手写风 tag + 剪纸拼贴风的图片框。chip 用 Courier + 方括号或全大写 + 旋转 -1°。CTA 粗黑边框 + 硬偏移 + 大写字体。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Zine, Xerox, photocopy, punk, cut and paste, Impact, Courier, high contrast, rotated cards, DIY, Riot Grrrl

description.zh: 黑白网点 + 漫画对话框 + Lichtenstein 色块。Pop Art 波普艺术直接搬到界面。Marvel/DC 漫画、Andy Warhol、Roy Lichtenstein、90s MTV 都是这套。适合娱乐、音乐、潮牌、独立游戏 landing。

zh: 粗黑边框 + 双层阴影（粉+蓝）
三主色：黄 #FFE600 + 粉 #FF3B7B + 蓝 #0038FF

hint.zh: 波普网点，黑白点 + 双层阴影 + Bangers 大写

zh.title: 基础 Prompt
zh.text: Halftone Comic 风格：米色底 + 全站细网点纹理（radial-gradient 6px spacing）。卡片粗黑 3px 边框 + 双层偏移阴影：先粉后蓝。标题用 Bangers / Impact 全大写。tag 用黄色 + 黑边 + 旋转 -3°。

zh.title: 进阶 Prompt
zh.text: Marvel Comics 官网 / 潮牌风：hero 一个 Bangers 大标题带 pink text-shadow（模拟 CMYK 错版）。CTA 大按钮蓝底 + 粗黑边 + 硬偏移。所有 chip 有 comic bubble 感（细微旋转 + 黑边）。加漫画对话框元素。

zh.title: 关键词
zh.text: Halftone, comic book, Pop Art, Lichtenstein, Marvel, Andy Warhol, Bangers, Impact, dots pattern, hard offset shadow
